title: Remove dead local notification system from SessionContext
problem: SessionContext maintains a local notification system (prevSessionsRef diffing, Notification[] state, clearNotifications) that is never consumed. DiscoverScreen no longer uses it — bell navigates to DB-backed NotificationsScreen.
goal: Remove dead notification code from SessionContext to reduce complexity and wasted computation
acceptance_criteria: Notification interface, notifications state, prevSessionsRef, diffing useEffect, clearNotifications removed from SessionContext
SessionContext provider value no longer exports notifications or clearNotifications
No consumers of the removed exports exist
No regression — all screens still compile
